examples: A nice box of chocolates or a poinsettia plant are good options.
The colour of the Poinsettia is getting more and more varied.
One of the most popular plants at Christmas is the poinsettia.
However, the charitable impact of the Poinsettia and Holiday Bowls should not go unnoticed.
With Poinsettia Bowl crowds reaching at least 30, 000 people on average, this is a significant donation.
